Hi, I'm Riya Sharma
UI/UX Developer & Designer

UI/UX Developer and Designer specializing in frontend development, feature enhancement, and user-centered design solutions

Projects

Introduction Video - classic.md

About Me

I am a passionate UI/UX Developer with a strong foundation in frontend development and user-centered design. Currently working at TechCraft Solutions, I specialize in feature enhancement, sprint-based delivery, and production debugging while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable software solutions.

My journey in design and development started with a curiosity for creating meaningful user experiences. With hands-on experience as a Lab Assistant at PES University and expertise in both technical implementation and design thinking, I bridge the gap between functionality and aesthetics.

Endorsements

What people say about my work

"Riya Sharma has shown strong clarity in user psychology and interface structuring. Her projects consistently demonstrated research-backed decisions and a refined design process. She is disciplined, creative, and highly focused on delivering meaningful user experiences."

Prof. Meera Kulkarni

Faculty Mentor

PES University

"Riya stood out for her ability to convert conceptual ideas into practical UI layouts. Her presentation and documentation skills were exceptionally clear, and she maintained a user-first approach in every assignment. She is dependable, hardworking, and a quick learner."

Dr. Sanjay Patil

HOD, Department of Computer Applications

PES University

"Riya brings both creativity and analytical thinking to the table. Her persona development, usability testing, and workflow mapping were always thorough. She is a promising UI/UX professional who understands both design theory and application."

Prof. Nisha Rao

UX Research Faculty

PES University, Bengaluru

"Working with Riya has always been inspiring. She brings fresh concepts, clean layouts, and strong collaboration energy. Her understanding of visual balance and typography makes her designs polished and easy to work with."

Kedar Varghese

Fellow Designer

PES University

"Riya guided me through several college design sprints and always encouraged experimentation. She explains design logic clearly and ensures everyone in the team is aligned. Her leadership and patience make group work much easier."

Arjun Menon

Junior Designer (Project Team)

PES University

"Riya has been active in design clubs and student projects. She contributed detailed UX case studies and helped streamline many group workflows. She is supportive, friendly, and someone everyone enjoys working with."

Shreya Desai

Student Coordinator

PES University

"Riya completed her internship under my supervision, and she quickly adapted to real-world design challenges. Her redesign of our onboarding flow improved user clarity and reduced friction. She is responsible, detail-oriented, and highly dependable."

Rahul Shetty

Product Design Lead

PixelCraft Studio, Bengaluru

"Riya demonstrates excellent communication and professionalism. She consistently delivered polished UI screens, aligned with requirements, and incorporated feedback effectively. Her dedication and design clarity made collaboration seamless."

Vivek Nair

Project Manager

Creative Minds Digital, Kochi
